observations.summary: The groaning and grinding of the bedrock beneath Dan's room parallels the primordial, massive presence of Dagon settling into the earth, symbolizing an ancient, crushing force beneath the surface of the house and Dan's life.

source_evidence.quote: Below his room, the bedrock groaned—a low, grinding claim. Dagon, settling into the earth beneath the house, making his weight known.

observations.target_hint: This echoes earlier descriptions of Dagon as a massive, earth-rooted force representing primal chaos and the foundation of struggle beneath Dan's existence.
